measurement_note: Size is Q, the total number of method calls. Each tier pushes N values, performs N full-depth increments, and pops all N values, so Q=3N. The lazy reference spends O(Q) total time. A correct eager implementation updates all N stored values for each increment and takes O(N^2) total time; the 60/240/960-operation tiers remain within the 1000-call contract and complete normally.
